# sonar-project.properties
# Run locally: sonar-scanner (from project root)

sonar.projectKey=aceest-fitness
sonar.projectName=ACEest Fitness & Gym
sonar.projectVersion=2.0

sonar.sources=.
sonar.exclusions=venv/**,htmlcov/**,tests/**,**/__pycache__/**,*.cfg

sonar.language=py
sonar.python.version=3.11

# Test & coverage reports generated by pytest
sonar.python.xunit.reportPath=test-results.xml
sonar.python.coverage.reportPaths=coverage.xml

sonar.host.url=http://localhost:9000
# sonar.login is injected by Jenkins withSonarQubeEnv()
